name: tv.tootie/apprise-mcp
title: Apprise MCP
description: MCP server for Apprise universal push notifications — send alerts to Slack, Discord, PagerDuty, and 80+ services.

environmentVariables.name: APPRISE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Apprise API server (e.g. http://apprise:8000).

environmentVariables.name: APPRISE_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for the upstream Apprise API server. Leave unset for open installs.

environmentVariables.name: APPRISE_MCP_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for MCP endpoint authentication.
